untranslatable_reason: Signal requires monitoring of strategy-level profit compression metrics over rolling 30-day windows and comparison of 10-day vs 30-day average returns. This requires custom performance tracking and percentile-based thresholds that cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/technical indicators. Specifically: (1) 'profit_compression_threshold_percentile' and 'rolling_profit_window_days' are meta-strategy parameters not available as indicators; (2) The exit trigger logic '10-day average profit < 65% of prior 30-day average' requires custom ratio calculations of strategy returns that exceed indicator-based rule definitions; (3) Position sizing adjustments (30-40% reduction) are portfolio-level decisions, not entry/exit conditions.
translation_notes: This signal describes a meta-strategy adaptation rule tied to strategy performance degradation due to market competition, not a traditional technical entry/exit setup. It requires a custom performance monitoring system outside the scope of indicator-based backtesting rules. The signal is fundamentally about regime detection (erosion of edge) rather than price action or technical signals.
